important_boundary: RAW-W labels are research lineage labels, not doctrine truth.
RAW-W does not mutate strategy, risk, execution, broker IO, Redis, or paper/live settings.
candidate_id may be synthetic and marked raw_w_candidate_id_source=synthetic_lineage_hash.
purpose: Strengthen RAW-S reports hook lineage so family, side, strategy_id, and candidate_id are derived from row/source lineage where possible.
